Start building with READYgg's plug-n-play SDK. Sign up and start now

Download Public SDK

Boost your dApp

Build with READYgg

W E B 3 M O B I L E G A M E D E V E L O P M E N T K I T

POWERED BY:

A community-driven initiative to bring web3 gaming into the mainstream with an unprecedented mobile game development toolkit.

Step 1:

Migrate Web3 v2

Step 2:

Launch Your Own dApp Store

Build Web3 Games that Flow

Immersive Player Experiences

Players won’t need to leave web3 games to connect wallets or purchase NFTs. Everything is integrated.

Built-In Scalability

Access development tools built for scalability. dApp Store Kit is built on Polygon’s layer2 and Ready’s layer3 solutions.

Optimized Monetization

We’ve taken core player loops and monetization funnels known to be successful in web2 and optimized them for web3.

Unmatched Web3 Game Development

Seamlessly evolve existing web2 games to web3, build new web3 games, and gain visibility.

  • Build with Ready’s SDK

  • Turnkey web3 API and Unity SDK

  • Playable MVP in <30 days

  • Integrated player wallets

  • Web2-like user acquisition

  • Smart contract + NFT minting tools

  • List on Ready's dApp Store

  • Web3 native dApp game marketplace

  • Instant listing & visibility

  • Increased development flexibility

  • Enhanced player experiences

  • Crypto wallet friendly

Start Building
Enter Ready's dApp Store

Launch Your Own dApp Store

List all of your web3 titles on your own dApp Store with full development customization and control. Launching a custom web3 game marketplace is seamless with dApp Store Kit.

Build Your dApp Store
Built for web3 mobile games
Perfect for F2P games
Complete transaction transparency
Crypto friendly
Integrated smart-contracts
Increased monetization opportunities

Community-Driven Initiative Powered by Polygon Labs

dApp Store Kit is an initiative driven by a community of web3 gaming innovators who believe that the widespread adoption of web3 and blockchain solutions will start in the gaming sector. If implemented and developed properly, the benefits web3 can offer gamers are far-reaching, without infringing on the user-friendly experience players in web2 have grown to love. The question is not if, it is when. The answer is this community initiative.

Join the Initiative
